chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.2201 of 2025 ____________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) ____________________________________________________ For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.11979/2025 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply at Flag A. 3. For orders on M.A. No.11980/2025 4. For hearing of Bail Application 27.08.2025 Mr. Salman Ahmed Soomro, Advocate for the applicant a/w the applicant. ---------------------------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through this bail application the applicant / accused namely Moti Kumar seeks protective bail as the learned Judicial Magistrate-II Jaccobabad directed the SHO of PS Saddar at Jaccobabad while issuing the arrest warrant to arrest the applicant and produce before the learned Magistrate in relation to offences punishable under Section 175 r/w Section 186 PPC (No.JM-II/1764/2025 dated 21.08.2025). Learned counsel for the applicant contends that the applicant is a Medico Legal Officer at Jaccobabad and conducted medical examination in FIR No.51 of 2025 and issued medico legal certificate and final medical certificate was to be issued after expert opinion of eye specialist. The applicant appeared before the learned District and Sessions Judge Jaccobabad and sought time as expert opinion of eye specialist was awaited. Meanwhile, applicant’s mother got ill and the applicant was unable to appear before the Court, but the learned Judicial Magistrate started legal proceedings against the applicant and issued bailable arrest warrant of the applicant for his non-appearance under Section 175 r/w Section 186 PPC.

The applicant appeared before the learned District and Sessions Judge Jaccobabad and sought time as expert opinion of eye specialist was awaited. Meanwhile, applicant’s mother got ill and the applicant was unable to appear before the Court, but the learned Judicial Magistrate started legal proceedings against the applicant and issued bailable arrest warrant of the applicant for his non-appearance under Section 175 r/w Section 186 PPC. The next hearing date is 30.08.2025. Counsel submits that the applicant intends to surrender before the trial Court to obtain pre-arrest bail but apprehends his arrest at the doorstep of the Court at the hands of police in order to humiliate and disgrace him. Hence, he has prayed for protection. Without touching the merits and de-merits of the case, applicant/accused namely Moti Kumar is granted protective bail until 30.08.2025 enabling him to surrender before the trial Court subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.40,000/- (Rupees forty thousand only) and P.R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Asif
